reactions.label: value_modeled
reactions.interest: predictability, quality and choice for one's own child
reactions.public_good_frame: a system parents trust is a public good in itself
reactions.argument: Fairer entry is welcome, but opaque quotas or lotteries would destroy trust in admissions.

reactions.label: value_modeled
reactions.interest: predictability, quality and choice for one's own child
reactions.public_good_frame: a system parents trust is a public good in itself
reactions.argument: Removing places takes an option away from our children before the alternative is proven.
reactions.condition_to_change: Show visibly improved local general schools first; then reduce places.

reactions.label: value_modeled
reactions.interest: predictability, quality and choice for one's own child
reactions.public_good_frame: a system parents trust is a public good in itself
reactions.argument: We fear levelling down: without guarantees, the good tracks disappear and nothing replaces them.
reactions.condition_to_change: Guaranteed quality standards and talent programmes in every district.

reactions.label: value_modeled
reactions.interest: predictability, quality and choice for one's own child
reactions.public_good_frame: a system parents trust is a public good in itself
reactions.argument: Better local schools without losing choice is exactly what most parents ask for.
reactions.condition_to_change: Improvements must be measurable at our own school, not in national averages.
